summary: GymFlow admin app tested end-to-end. Backend: 23/23 pytest cases pass (auth, members CRUD, attendance check-in/out + double-checkin guard, payments + receipt + expiry extension, dashboard stats, all 3 analytics endpoints). Frontend: login with admin@gymflow.com/admin123 works, bad-creds error shown, dashboard renders all stat testIDs (active members, today attendance, pending fees, expiring, monthly revenue), members tab supports search/filter/add with required-field validation, new member creation succeeds and appears in list, member detail navigation works, attendance screen + check-in modal open, fees pending/history tabs render and collect-fee modal opens with plan/amount inputs and MARK PAID button. Two minor deprecation warnings from underlying RN libs (pointerEvents prop, TouchableWithoutFeedback) -- internal to expo-router/RN, not app code. No critical issues found.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' and 'TouchableWithoutFeedback is deprecated. Please use Pressable.' These come from library internals (not app code). Informational only - no action required unless wishing to silence.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to lifespan handlers in a future iteration (not blocking).
CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True - works but is overly permissive; restrict to EXPO_BACKEND_URL for production.
GET /api/payments/pending is declared after GET /api/payments/{payment_id} would have conflicted, but order in code is correct (pending before {id}). Verified working.
seed_data_creation: Did not modify seed data. Created and cleaned up one ephemeral TESTUI member during UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_gymflow_api.py is reusable. Frontend testIDs are comprehensive (login-*, stat-*, monthly-revenue, add-member-btn, member-search-input, filter-*, member-row-*, input-*, save-member-btn, edit-btn, delete-btn, open-checkin-btn, checkin-search, pick-*, checkout-*, collect-*, plan-*, fee-amount-input, confirm-pay, receipt-*, tab-*). For UI nav, use direct URLs (/members, /attendance, /fees) instead of clicking 'MEMBERS' text - tab labels with bottom tab bar are not reliably clickable via text selectors in headless mode.
